链上透明决策，去中心化自主治理，构建无许可自治生态: Transparent on-chain decision-making and decentralized self-governance to build a permissionless autonomous ecosystem.
desc: The NEM.io Foundation Ltd., a financial blockchain institution in Kuala Lumpur, is headquartered in Singapore and promotes NEM blockchain technology globally. It has established its Southeast Asia regional headquarters and core R&D center in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
desc1: As the Southeast Asia regional headquarters (excluding China, Australia, and Singapore), the center covers 11,000 square feet and is the largest blockchain center in the region.
desc2: The foundation has allocated US$5 million to support the resident financial and ecosystem projects.
desc3: The foundation plans to invest about US$40 million in 2026 to expand global ecosystem applications and land the technology in the financial and retail sectors.
正式开启NFT股东招募计划: The NFT shareholder recruitment program is officially open.
